judge_reason: Description B quotes specific verbatim text (headline, subheadline, newspaper name, date, location) that Description A does not mention at all, indicating a major discrepancy in the visual content described.

gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A document page with a pasted newspaper clipping titled “FLYING SAUCER REPORT MAY BE BALLOON,” surrounded by handwritten annotations, a small purple typewritten name list at upper right, and official stamps near the bottom reading “OFFICE OF THE LEGAL ATTACHE AMERICAN EMBASSY LONDON, ENGLAND” and “NOT RECORDED 76 APR 29 1950.”*
